Appearances:
Plaintiff Lori Chang, is present. Represented by
Attorney, Susan Parkinson, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Manuel Rodriguez , is present.
Attorney, Jinnhua Su, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-06-2010 is vacated.
